title: Lomariopsis undulata
taxonomy: Lomariopsis undulata belongs to the family Lomariopsidaceae and is classified within the order Polypodiales of the class Polypodiopsida. It is further categorized under the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns. The species is a type of epiphytic fern, known for its distinctive undulating fronds. Lomariopsis undulata is native to various regions, including Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands. Its classification is primarily based on morphological characteristics and molecular phylogenetic studies.
